task_completion.description: Verify the Physical Inventory document header is created with the correct warehouse, description, and date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Physical Inventory document header in the iDempiere interface with the Warehouse field set to 'HQ', Description set to 'Year-End Count Q4 2024', and Movement Date set to '2024-12-31' (or equivalent date format).

task_completion.description: Verify the first inventory count line for Azalea Bush.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an inventory line record (in a table or sub-tab) showing the Product 'Azalea Bush' and a count/quantity of 150.

task_completion.description: Verify the second inventory count line for Elm Tree.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an inventory line record showing the Product 'Elm Tree' and a count/quantity of 75.

task_completion.description: Verify the third inventory count line for Patio Set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an inventory line record showing the Product 'Patio Set' and a count/quantity of 30.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is left in 'Draft' status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Document Status field showing 'Draft' or 'Drafted', or verify that the document has not been processed/completed (e.g., a 'Complete' or 'Process' button is still visible and unclicked).

integrity.description: The agent used the iDempiere GUI to create the inventory document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the iDempiere web interface being navigated and filled out, rather than terminal commands, database scripts, or API calls.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual iDempiere application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser shows the genuine iDempiere ERP interface with standard menus, tabs, and fields, not a mock HTML page or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent didn't just type the expected answers into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The data is entered into the correct specific fields within the iDempiere Physical Inventory and Inventory Line tabs, not just written out in a notepad or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Physical Inventory document must have Description: 'Year-End Count Q4 2024', Warehouse: 'HQ', and Movement Date: '2024-12-31'. It must contain exactly three lines: 1) Product 'Azalea Bush' with count 150, 2) Product 'Elm Tree' with count 75, and 3) Product 'Patio Set' with count 30. The document must remain in 'Draft' status.
